rows.label: qev015201_MSG0001
rows.name:
Um, excuse me.
Could I consult with you for a bit?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015201_MSG0002
rows.name:
I am truly delighted that we've begun
living alongside the Ma-non, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015201_MSG0003
rows.name:
There are also many problems arising from
the rapid population increase.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015201_JNK0010
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: qev015201_SEL0011
rows.name: State that their manners are certainly bad.

rows.label: qev015201_JNK0020
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev015201_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask if it is a food problem.

rows.label: qev015201_MSG0004
rows.name:
Right.
There are some things that can't just be brushed off as cultural differences.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015201_MSG0005
rows.name: But haven't you forgotten a more fundamental issue?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015201_MSG0006
rows.name:
The food problem is serious, of course,
but that falls under a different jurisdiction.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015201_MSG0007
rows.name: There is something just as essential for survival as food, isn't there?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015201_MSG0008
rows.name:
It's water for daily life.
Right now, we are overwhelmingly short on clean water.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015201_MSG0009
rows.name:
That's why we decided to build a water purification plant at a nearby lake,
but there are many native creatures along the route,
and transporting materials has stalled...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015201_MSG0010
rows.name:
Could I ask you to guard the transport route?
If safety is secured, the work will progress,
and the problem should be resolved swiftly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015201_MSG0011
rows.name:
Water is the foundation of life.
I'm a little proud to be a researcher here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015201_MSG0012
rows.name:
The drinks everyone consumes normally
and daily showers are only possible because of clean water.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015201_MSG0013
rows.name: You understand how important this facility is, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015201_MSG0014
rows.name:
Good work, I've received the report.
Thank you for your help this time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015201_MSG0015
rows.name:
You swept the enemies around the construction site as well, right?
I really should add a bonus to your reward,
but could you just consider it a free service this once?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015201_MSG0016
rows.name: I'm sorry, things are tight for us too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015201_MSG0017
rows.name: This is the water from the site, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015201_MSG0018
rows.name:
Ah, putting it in a container with such questionable airtightness again...
Jeez...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015201_MSG0019
rows.name:
I don't think there's anything to worry about, though.
Still, water is the foundation of life, isn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015201_MSG0020
rows.name:
They say the Roman aqueducts were used for 2,000 years;
water is also the foundation of civilization.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015201_MSG0021
rows.name:
Cheers to a new civilization in a new land!
Is it okay if I pay your reward in water?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015201_MSG0022
rows.name: I'm joking! I'll pay you properly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015201_MSG0023
rows.name:
Good work, I've received the report.
Thank you for your help this time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015201_MSG0024
rows.name:
It seems you helped out with something at the site as well.
If you want to bill for a daily wage, tell the construction company.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015201_MSG0025
rows.name: I'm sorry, but that's impossible with my discretion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015201_MSG0026
rows.name: This is the water from the site, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015201_MSG0027
rows.name:
Ah, putting it in a container with such questionable airtightness again...
Jeez...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015201_MSG0028
rows.name:
I don't think there's anything to worry about, though.
Still, water is the foundation of life, isn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015201_MSG0029
rows.name:
They say the Roman aqueducts were used for 2,000 years;
water is also the foundation of civilization.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015201_MSG0030
rows.name:
Cheers to a new civilization in a new land!
Is it okay if I pay your reward in water?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015201_MSG0031
rows.name: I'm joking! I'll pay you properly.[ST:wait ]
